title: OC-Titan codegen envelope
description: Deterministic multi-file output contract for any turn that generates project files. See PROJECT_MEMORY.md and docs/OC_TITAN_PHASE1_PLAN.md.

path.description: POSIX-style, sandbox-relative path. Must NOT start with '/' or contain NUL bytes; backward '..' traversal is rejected by fs_ops::resolve at apply time.

content.description: Full file contents. No markdown fences, no partial snippets.

run_cmd.description: Optional single-line suggested run command. Phase 1: captured and surfaced only, NEVER auto-executed.
